dungeon_names: The Caves of the Hollow Star
cave_descriptions: A split in the hill exhales air scented with copper
Stone teeth frame a low entrance behind a dead waterfall
A spiral stair has been cut into a natural sinkhole
The cave mouth opens only when its bronze bell is rung
dungeon_themes: the molting ground of an ancient serpent
a shrine corrupted by prophetic insects
room_descriptions: The walls sweat black water around crude devotional carvings
Pillars of translucent stone hum when approached
Roots pierce the ceiling and clutch rusted weapons
A mineral crust covers signs of a recent struggle
The chamber narrows around a floor of fitted skulls
hazards: unstable stone that collapses under sudden weight
a current dragging toward a submerged shaft
traps: a bell wire that alerts the next chamber
poison needles hidden in a saint's mouth
a false bridge over a shallow spike pit
a rune that steals the reader's voice
clues: a bloodstained map scratched on slate
wax tablets naming a town official
tracks that stop at a blank wall
a prayer describing the final threat's weakness
fresh lamp soot from a recent visitor
treasures: a purse of clipped imperial coins
a star-iron dagger with no edge
a sealed coffer of trade bars
dungeon_monsters: the drowned knight and its oath-bound dead
weird_room_details: Shadows point toward the nearest living heart
An unseen host quietly counts every spoken word
Old blood crawls uphill in thin threads
A second ceiling is visible beneath the floor
Metal objects become warm near the eastern wall
retreat_options: fall back through the previous chamber and bar the passage
scatter bitter herbs to discourage pursuit
cross a narrow ledge the larger threat cannot follow
